title: hedeoma crenata
intro: Hedeoma crenata, also known as American pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its carminative and antiseptic effects, which can help to relieve digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Hedeoma crenata include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Hedeoma crenata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
